description: An object representing the blueprint for the entire study in Axon, including the tasks, events, steps and their dependent objects.
label: Study
name: c_study

properties.description: Indicates whether the caregiver functionality is enabled for this study
properties.label: Caregiver enabled
properties.name: c_caregiver_enabled

properties.description: Indicates whether caregivers have access to ePRO features for assisting patients.
properties.label: Caregiver ePRO enabled
properties.name: c_caregiver_epro_enabled

properties.description: The default participant schedule to use upon Participant enrollment
properties.label: Default Participant Schedule
properties.name: c_default_participant_schedule

properties.description: Determines if new site permission is enabled or not
properties.label: Use New Site Permission Model
properties.name: c_new_site_permission_model

properties.description: Determines if the study should save PII or not
properties.label: No PII
properties.name: c_no_pii

properties.description: Email digest interval in weeks (1 = weekly, 2 = bi-weekly, etc.)
properties.label: PI Oversight Email Interval Weeks
properties.name: c_pi_oversight_email_interval_weeks

properties.description: Enables PI Oversight feature for this study
properties.label: PI Oversight Enabled
properties.name: c_pi_oversight_enabled

properties.description: Grace period in days before marking review as overdue
properties.label: PI Oversight Overdue Grace Days
properties.name: c_pi_oversight_overdue_grace_days

properties.description: Review window in weeks (0 = never due)
properties.label: PI Oversight Review Due Weeks
properties.name: c_pi_oversight_review_due_weeks

properties.description: If Required Signature is true then user have to sign the document before review
properties.label: Required Signature
properties.name: c_required_signature

properties.description: Will the clients expect the study to use the advanced task scheduling
properties.label: Use Advanced Task Scheduler
properties.name: c_use_advanced_task_scheduler
